Yamaha NVX Specifications & Features

The Yamaha NVX is offered Petrol engine in the Malaysia. The new Scooter from Yamaha comes in a total of 2 variants. If we talk about Yamaha NVX engine specs then the Petrol engine displacement is 155 cc. Yamaha NVX is available with CVT transmission. Also, depending on the variant and fuel type the Yamaha NVX has a fuel consumption of 36 kmpl. The Yamaha NVX is a 2 Seater Scooter and has a length of 1980 mm the width of 700 mm, and a wheelbase of 1350 mm. along with a ground clearance of 145 mm.

Read More Read Less
Key Specs of Yamaha NVX
Fuel Type
Petrol
Displacement
155 cc
Maximum Power
15 hp
Start Option
Electric

Technical Specifications of Yamaha NVX

Standard Scooter, Petrol, CVT RM 9,598 OTR Price
  • Engine & Performance
  • Dimension
  • Fuel & Ignition
  • Chassis & Suspension
  • Wheels & Tyres
  • Gear & Transmission
  • Electrical
  • Displacement 155 cc
  • Maximum Power 15 hp
  • Fuel Tank Capacity 5.5 L
  • Maximum Torque 13.9 Nm
  • Drive Type Belt Drive
  • Compression Ratio 11.6:1
  • Clutch Type Dry, Centrifugal, Automatic
  • Cooling System Liquid Cooled
  • Valve Configuration SOHC
  • No. Of Strokes 4-Stroke
  • Lubrication System Wet Sump
  • Bore X Stroke 58 mm x 58.7 mm
  • Injection Type Fuel Injection
  • Engine Type Single Cylinder, 4-Stroke, Liquid Cooled Engine
  • No. Of Cylinder 1
  • Exhaust Pipes Single Exhaust
  • Fuel Consumption 36 kmpl
  • RPM at Maximum Torque 6500 rpm
  • RPM at Maximum Power 8000 rpm
  • Category Scooter
  • Seating Capacity 2
  • Kerb Weight 122 kg
  • Height 1150 mm
  • Seat Height 790 mm
  • Ground Clearance 145 mm
  • Oil Tank Capacity 1 L
  • Width 700 mm
  • Length 1980 mm
  • Wheel Base 1350 mm
  • Ignition System TCI
  • Start Option Electric
  • Fuel Type Petrol
  • Fuel Supply System Fuel Injection
  • Rear Suspension Swing Arm
  • Front Suspension Telescopic Fork
  • Rear Wheel Size R14
  • Front Tyre 110/80 R14
  • Rear Tyre 140/70 R14
  • Tyre Type Radial, Tubeless
  • Front Wheel Size R14
  • Transmission Type CVT
  • Gear Box Variable Speed
  • Battery Voltage 12 V

Yamaha NVX Features

Standard Scooter, Petrol, CVT RM 9,598 OTR Price
  • Safety & Security
  • Console
  • Chassis & Suspension
  • Electrical
  • Brake
  • Differentiating Features
  • Pass Switch Yes
  • Side Reflectors Yes
  • Engine Check Warning Yes
  • Riding Modes Street
  • Launch Control No
  • Leg Guards No
  • Wheel Lock Front/back No
  • Back Rest No
  • Odometer Digital
  • Fuel Gauge Digital
  • Speedometer Digital
  • Navigator No
  • Tachometer Yes
  • Tripmeter Yes
  • Display Screen Yes
  • Body Frame Type Backbone
  • Seat Type Dual Stepped
  • Body Frame Material Steel
  • Side Wings Yes
  • Indicator Light Yes
  • Accessory Outlet Yes
  • Head Lamp LED
  • Tail Lamp LED
  • Adjustable Headlights Yes
  • Rear Brake Drum
  • Front Brake Disc
  • Additional Features Smart Keyless System
  • Cruise Control No
  • Height Adjustable Seats No
ABS Scooter, Petrol, CVT RM 11,498 OTR Price

Specs Pros & Cons

Things we like in Yamaha NVX
  • Engine & Performance

    Yamaha’s Blue Core engine provides a great balance of power and economy.

  • Chassis & Suspension

    The large front fairing, meaty rear-end, and fatter tyres make the scooter one of the sportiest looking scooters in the segment.

Things we don't like in Yamaha NVX
  • Dimension

    The stepped-up seat of the scooter is not so comfortable for the pillion riders.

  • Chassis & Suspension

    The ride quality is a bit stiff, especially at the time of tackling worse roads.

View More View Less

Yamaha NVX Features Highlights

  • Additional Features

    The scooter has a massive under-seat storage of 25 litres, capacious enough to hold a full-face helmet along with small knick-knacks.

    Read More
    Available For
    Standard

Yamaha NVX Questions & Answers (FAQs)

What is the Engine Capacity of Yamaha NVX?

The Yamaha NVX is offered in 1 engine option: 155 cc. Check complete specs here: Yamaha NVX spec

Helpful (18)

What are the Safety Features Available in Yamaha NVX?

Yamaha NVX safety features are: ABS, Pass Switch, Engine Check Warning and Side Reflectors
